summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LGSS SCUM Server Manager Iteration 2. All 46 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all new features: schema endpoint, 5 section tabs, dynamic field rendering with search, real SCUM defaults loading, export/import endpoints, and existing flows (admin prompt, disk wizard, server CRUD, start/stop, rename).
critical_code_review_comments: Server start/stop is SIMULATED (status toggle in DB only) - real process spawn is in Electron for Windows build as documented
String values (time ranges like '02:00:00', gold prices like '1g') are correctly preserved as strings, not converted to numbers
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Tests use POST /api/setup/reset to clear state before each test run. Real SCUM defaults loaded from /app/backend/scum_defaults/
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 2 features working. Backend tests cover: schema endpoint (20 categories, 5 sections), server creation with real SCUM defaults (srv_general 64 keys, srv_world 134 keys, srv_features 127 keys, 28 traders, 5 raid times, 40 input axis mappings, 2 admin users with flags), export endpoints (server_settings, raid_times, notifications, input, economy, gameusersettings, admins), import endpoints (server_settings, raid_times, input), settings update with partial merge. Frontend uses data-testid attributes: section-tab-{server|users|economy|advanced|client}, panel-{category_key}, field-{category}-{key}, export-{category}.

backend: GET /api/settings/schema - returns 20 categories and 5 sections
POST /api/servers - creates server with real SCUM defaults from scum_defaults/ files
srv_general has 64 keys including scum.ServerName='[TR] LEGENDARY GAMING  TEST SERVER'
srv_world has ~134 keys
srv_features has ~127 keys
economy_traders has 28 traders (A_0_Armory, A_0_BoatShop, etc.)
raid_times has 5 entries
input_axis has 40 entries
users_admins has 2 entries with steam IDs and flags (76561199169074640, 76561199064932818[godmode])
GET /api/servers/{id}/export/server_settings - returns INI with 6 sections
GET /api/servers/{id}/export/raid_times - returns JSON with raiding-times array
GET /api/servers/{id}/export/notifications - returns JSON with Notifications array
GET /api/servers/{id}/export/input - returns INI with 40 AxisMappings
GET /api/servers/{id}/export/economy - returns JSON with economy-override and 28 traders
GET /api/servers/{id}/export/gameusersettings - returns INI with 5 client sections
GET /api/servers/{id}/export/admins - returns INI with steam IDs and flags
POST /api/servers/{id}/import/server_settings - parses INI and merges into srv_* categories
POST /api/servers/{id}/import/raid_times - parses JSON and replaces raid_times array
POST /api/servers/{id}/import/input - parses INI and sets input_axis + input_action
PUT /api/servers/{id}/settings - merges partial nested updates preserving other keys
String values (time ranges, gold prices) preserved correctly
frontend: Section tabs: SUNUCU AYARLARI (server), KULLANICILAR (users), EKONOMİ (economy), GELİŞMİŞ (advanced), İSTEMCİ VARSAYILANLARI (client)
panel-srv_general shows 64 fields with search box filtering
panel-users_admins shows pre-populated steam IDs with flags
panel-raid_times shows 5 raid time entries with editable table
DynamicFields search filters fields by key name
Export button visible and functional for each category
Existing flows: admin prompt, disk wizard, server CRUD, start/stop, rename all working
